feed.title: Da Kong （孔达）
feed.subtitle: Da Kong's personal homepage
feed.rights: All rights reserved 2024, Da Kong （孔达）

entry.title: News
entry.summary: 2024-10-1: Our paper "Simplified POMDP Planning with an Alternative Observation Space and Formal Performance Guarantees" has been accepted to ISRR 2024.
entry.content:
2024-10-1: Our paper "Simplified POMDP Planning with an Alternative Observation Space and Formal Performance Guarantees" has been accepted to ISRR 2024.

2023-5-25: I will join the ANPL lab at Technion - Israel Institute of Technology.

entry.title: Publication
entry.summary:
Da Kong and Vadim Indelman, “Simplified POMDP Planning with an Alternative Observation Space and Formal Performance Guarantees.”in International Symposium of Robotics Research (ISRR), Dec. 2024. Project, Arxiv

Da Kong, Yu Zhang, and Weichen Dai, “Direct Near-Infrared-Depth Visual SLAM with Active Lighting.” IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (with IROS), 2021. DOI

Weichen Dai, Yu Zhang, Shenzhou Chen, Donglei Sun, and Da Kong, “A Multi-spectral Dataset for Evaluating Motion Estimation Systems.” Proceedings of the 2021 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2021), Xi’an, China. Arxiv, DOI
entry.content:
Da Kong and Vadim Indelman, “Simplified POMDP Planning with an Alternative Observation Space and Formal Performance Guarantees.”in International Symposium of Robotics Research (ISRR), Dec. 2024. Project, Arxiv

Da Kong, Yu Zhang, and Weichen Dai, “Direct Near-Infrared-Depth Visual SLAM with Active Lighting.” IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (with IROS), 2021. DOI

Weichen Dai, Yu Zhang, Shenzhou Chen, Donglei Sun, and Da Kong, “A Multi-spectral Dataset for Evaluating Motion Estimation Systems.” Proceedings of the 2021 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2021), Xi’an, China. Arxiv, DOI

Ying Liu, Junyi Tao, Da Kong, Yu Zhang, and Ping Li, “A Visual Compass Based on Point and Line Features for UAV High-Altitude Orientation Estimation.” Remote Sensing, 2022.

Liyang Zheng, Yuheng Zha, Da Kong, Hanqing Yang, and Yu Zhang, “Multi-Branch Angle Aware Spatial Temporal Graph Convolutional Neural Network for Model-Based Gait Recognition.” IET Cyber-Systems and Robotics, 2022.

Weichen Dai, Shenzhou Chen, Zhaoyang Huang, Yan Xu, and Da Kong. ”LiDAR Intensity Completion: Fully Exploiting the Message from LiDAR Sensors.” Sensors, 2022.

Junyi Tao, Weichen Dai, Da Kong, Jiayan Wan, Bin He, and Yu Zhang, ”Drift-Free Localization Using Prior Cross-Source Map for Indoor Low-Light Environments.” IET Cyber-Systems and Robotics, 2023.

entry.title: Da Kong 孔达
entry.summary: Hey! My name is Da Kong. I am now a research assistant in the ANPL lab at Technion, supervised by Prof. Vadim Indelman), with a potential transition to a PhD student.
entry.content:
Hey! My name is Da Kong. I am now a research assistant in the ANPL lab at Technion, supervised by Prof. Vadim Indelman), with a potential transition to a PhD student.

My research interest focuses on SLAM and robotics navigation. I am working on active SLAM and POMDP.

I used to study in the Intelligent Autonomous System Lab at Zhejiang University, supervised by Prof. Yu Zhang. I also worked closely with Dr. Weichen Dai, now at Hangzhou Dianzi University.
